bridge_equation_v14.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v14 = mean(B_plastic_v13, G_coupled, 1 - P_coupled, D_feature_v8, 1 - G_brain_v8)
bridge_equation_v14.structure_term: B_struct_v14 = mean(B_struct_v13, K_struct, K_route, 1 - R_fail, D_structure_v8)
bridge_equation_v14.readiness_term: R_train_v14 = mean(R_train_v13, B_plastic_v14, B_struct_v14, A_coupled, D_align_v8, 1 - R_fail)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第十四桥开始显式吸收路由-结构联动退化链，使训练规则开始面向更真实的联动失稳，而不是分别处理单项风险。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第十四桥并回主核，检验主核在联动退化压力下是否还能继续收口。
